item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8126-1: Linux kernel (Azure) vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8126-1: Linux kernel (Azure) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the AppArmor Linux kernel Security Module (LSM). An unprivileged local attacker could use these issues to load, replace, and remove arbitrary AppArmor profiles causing denial of service, exposure of sensitive information (kernel memory), local privilege escalation, or possibly escape a container. (LP: #2143853) It was discovered that improper initialization of...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8126-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8124-1: Bind vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8124-1: Bind vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Samy Medjahed discovered that Bind incorrectly handled insecure delegation validation. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause excessive NSEC3 iterations, consuming CPU resources, and leading to a denial of service. (CVE-2026-1519) Vitaly Simonovich discovered that Bind incorrectly handled memory when preparing DNSSEC proofs of non-existence. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause m...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8124-1

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-33417 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-33417 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
Wallos is an open-source, self-hostable personal subscription tracker. Prior to version 4.7.2, password reset tokens in Wallos never expire. The password_resets table includes a created_at timestamp column, but the token validation logic never checks it. A password reset token remains valid indefinitely until it is used, allowing an attacker who intercepts a reset link at any point to use it days, weeks, or months la...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33417

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-4766 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-4766 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The Easy Image Gallery plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the Gallery shortcode post meta field in all versions up to, and including, 1.5.3. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user-supplied gallery shortcode values. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4766

item.title: [Segurança] Coruna iOS exploit framework linked to Triangulation attacks
item.description:
💣 Coruna iOS exploit framework linked to Triangulation attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Coruna exploit kit is an evolution of the framework used in the Operation Triangulation espionage campaign, which in 2023 targeted iPhones via zero-click iMessage exploits.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/coruna-ios-exploit-framework-linked-to-triangulation-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] Coruna iOS Kit Reuses 2023 Triangulation Exploit Code in New Mass Attacks
item.description:
💣 Coruna iOS Kit Reuses 2023 Triangulation Exploit Code in New Mass Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The kernel exploit for two security vulnerabilities used in the recently uncovered Apple iOS exploit kit known as Coruna is an updated version of the same exploit that was used in the Operation Triangulation campaign back in 2023, according to new findings from Kaspersky. "When Coruna was first reported, the public evidence wasn't sufficient to link its code to Triangulation — shared
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/coruna-ios-kit-reuses-2023.html

item.title: [Segurança] Claude Extension Flaw Enabled Zero-Click XSS Prompt Injection via Any Website
item.description:
💣 Claude Extension Flaw Enabled Zero-Click XSS Prompt Injection via Any Website
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a vulnerability in Anthropic's Claude Google Chrome Extension that could have been exploited to trigger malicious prompts simply by visiting a web page. The flaw "allowed any website to silently inject prompts into that assistant as if the user wrote them," Koi Security researcher Oren Yomtov said in a report shared with The Hacker News.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/claude-extension-flaw-enabled-zero.html

item.title: [Segurança] Hackers Exploit Compromised Enterprise Identities at Industrial Scale, Warns SentinelOne - Infosecurity Magazine
item.description:
💣 Hackers Exploit Compromised Enterprise Identities at Industrial Scale, Warns SentinelOne - Infosecurity Magazine
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo SentinelOne. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.

item.title: [Infraestrutura] F5 NGINX Plus and Open Source Vulnerability Allow Attackers to Execute Code Using MP4 file - CyberSecurityNews
item.description:
📰 F5 NGINX Plus and Open Source Vulnerability Allow Attackers to Execute Code Using MP4 file - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Nginx, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] PolyShell attacks target 56% of all vulnerable Magento stores
item.description:
📰 PolyShell attacks target 56% of all vulnerable Magento stores
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a SentinelOne, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/polyshell-attacks-target-56-percent-of-all-vulnerable-magento-stores/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Looking at Technology from a Different Perspective: Francesca Palazzo’s Approach to Customer Strategy with VMware Cloud Foundation
item.description:
📰 Looking at Technology from a Different Perspective: Francesca Palazzo’s Approach to Customer Strategy with VMware Cloud Foundation
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Francesca Palazzo approaches technology the same way she approaches most challenges: by looking at it from different perspectives. As a VMware Cloud Foundation Professional Services Solution Architect with Broadcom for the past three years, Francesca defines and shapes customer projects. Based in Rome, she supports more than 20 strategic VMware Cloud Foundation customers throughout Italy.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/03/26/looking-at-technology-from-a-different-perspective-francesca-palazzos-approach-to-customer-strategy-with-vmware-cloud-foundation/
